channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Suspect in killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO returning to New York to face murder charges
item.description: HOLLIDAYSBURG, Pa. (AP) — The suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO is being returned to New York to face murder charges after agreeing to be extradited Thursday during a court appearance in Pennsylvania where he was arrested last week after five days on the run.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The Black Crowes enjoy Grammy Awards love again several decades after first nomination
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The first time Chris and Rich Robinson were at the Grammy Awards, it was 1991. The New York Giants had won the Super Bowl, and the U.S. was in the midst of the Gulf War.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: France's Macron visits cyclone-devastated Mayotte as residents plead for water, food and other aid
item.description: MAMOUDZOU, Mayotte (AP) — French President Emmanuel Macron arrived Thursday in the Indian Ocean archipelago of Mayotte to survey Cyclone Chido’s destruction and was immediately confronted with a first-hand account of devastation across the French territory.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK, ADRIENNE SURPRENANT and SYLVIE CORBET, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Amazon workers strike at facilities around the country as Teamsters seek contract
item.description: Amazon says it doesn’t expect an impact on its operations during what the union calls the largest strike against the company in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Caught on camera: Porch pirate steals package in front of UPS driver
item.description: A porch pirate was caught on camera Wednesday afternoon, apparently swiping a package from the front porch of a home.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: France rape trial: Gisèle Pelicot speaks out after ex-husband, 50 others found guilty
item.description: Gisèle Pelicot spoke of her “very difficult ordeal” after 51 men were all found guilty Thursday in the drugging-and-rape trial that turned her into a feminist hero, expressing support for other victims of sexual violence whose cases don't get such attention and “whose stories remain untold.
item.dc:creator: John Leicester, Fox 5

item.title: A power grab by Republicans in North Carolina becomes a referendum on democracy in the states
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Democrats in North Carolina were celebrating big wins in the swing state after the November election, including victories in races for governor and other top statewide offices. But the political high didn’t last long.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO and GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Harmful gas billowing from Texas and New Mexico comes mostly from smaller leaks, researchers say
item.description: Huge quantities of methane, a powerful greenhouse gas, are being emitting by oil and gas operators in the 75,000-square-mile Permian Basin straddling Texas and New Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Tammy Webber, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Number of dead and missing still unclear as first aid arrives in quake-hit Pacific nation of Vanuatu
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Amid the havoc wrought by a violent earthquake two days earlier, Ivan Oswald and his staff prepared for lunchtime service Thursday at Nambawan Cafe, on an idyllic stretch of Vanuatu’s waterfront.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In Florida, a race is on to save the Everglades and protect a key source of drinking water
item.description: EVERGLADES, Fla. (AP) — In a region of Florida known as the River of Grass, John Kominoski plops into hip-deep waters. Blobs of brown periphyton – a mishmash of algae, bacteria and other organisms – carpet the surface.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA and REBECCA BLACKWELL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Former top aide to New York City's mayor expected in court on criminal charges, AP sources say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A former top aide to New York City Mayor Eric Adams is expected in court Thursday to face corruption charges in the latest blow to an administration beset by searches, resignations and the mayor's own indictment.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is 'coffee badging?' Workplace trend seen as protest to return-to-office push
item.description: As the post-pandemic return-to-office push gathers steam, again, workers are quietly mounting a pushback of their own.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Man accused of running secret Chinese gov police station in NYC makes plea: US Attorney
item.description: One of two New York City residents accused of operating a secret Chinese police station in Chinatown pleaded guilty in federal court to conspiring to act as an agent of China.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Two bald eagles struck by vehicles in Michigan in as many days: DNR
item.description: Unfortunately, the DNR says eagle-vehicle collisions are somewhat common, especially along highways with faster speed limits.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida pursues charge against suspect in Trump assassination attempt for a crash after his arrest
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida authorities announced Wednesday that they're pursuing a criminal case against a man accused of trying to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump for a car crash that occurred after law enforcement stopped traffic to catch him.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Oldest known stone tablet inscribed with the Ten Commandments sells for over $5M
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The oldest known stone tablet inscribed with the Ten Commandments sold for more than $5 million at an auction on Wednesday. Sotheby’s said the 155-pound (52-kilogram) marble slab was acquired by an anonymous buyer who plans to donate it to an Israeli institution.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Scientists find 'forever chemicals' lurking in certain smartwatch wristbands
item.description: Prior research has shown that more than a fifth of Americans wear a smartwatch or a fitness tracker — and they do so for extended periods of time.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Over 500,000 winter tires recalled due to poor traction in snow
item.description: A tire company that sells winter tires has issued a recall for more than 540,000 of its snow tires, which do not comply with North American standards due to lack of proper traction on snow.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 1 dead, 9 injured in Maryland shooting and fiery car crash: police
item.description: One person has died and nine others were injured following a shooting and related fiery car crash in Maryland on Tuesday, police said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, WGN 9

item.title: Electoral College formally votes to confirm Trump's win
item.description: President-elect Trump has clinched the necessary number of Electoral College votes to become the next occupant of the White House, teeing up the official certification of his victory before Congress next month.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump names Herschel Walker as ambassador to Bahamas
item.description: Trump had quipped before Election Day that he would put Walker in charge of a new missile defense shield if elected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: GOP report recommends Liz Cheney be criminally investigated over Jan. 6 work
item.description: It’s a claim that if pursued would likely face significant roadblocks but that nonetheless comes as Trump has suggested members of the Jan. 6 panel should “go to jail” for their work.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KRON4

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts face more time in space with return delayed until at least late March
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — NASA's two stuck astronauts just got their space mission extended again. That means they won't be back until spring, 10 months after rocketing into orbit on Boeing's Starliner capsule.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN AP Aerospace Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Amazon has up to 20% off gift cards ahead of the holidays
item.description: You can save on a wide range of gift cards, making it easier and more affordable to give the gift of shopping and saving.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, KTLA 5

item.title: 1 dead, 9 injured in Maryland shooting and fiery car crash: police
item.description: One person has died and nine others were injured following a shooting and related fiery car crash in Maryland on Tuesday, police said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, Fox 5

item.title: Rear seat belt reminders to be required in 2027
item.description: NHTSA estimated the new rule will prevent more than 500 injuries and save about 50 lives each year if and when it's fully implemented.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Suspect charged with killing UnitedHealthcare's CEO as an act of terrorism
item.description: The man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare's CEO has been charged with murder as an act of terrorism, prosecutors said Tuesday as they worked to bring him to a New York court from a Pennsylvania jail. Luigi Mangione already was charged with murder in the Dec.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Tech consultant found guilty of second-degree murder in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A San Francisco jury on Tuesday found a tech consultant guilty of second-degree murder in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee, which carries a sentence of 16 years to life, rejecting the defendant's claim that he had acted in self defense.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to claim a 2nd payment from the Equifax data breach settlement
item.description: Equifax has started alerting people of more money waiting for them from a massive fund the credit reporting agency paid to settle a data breach.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Suspect charged with killing UnitedHealthcare CEO as an act of terrorism, authorities announce
item.description: Mangione had previously been charged with murder in Thompson's killing, but the terror allegation is new.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: What we know about the victims in Wisconsin Christian school shooting
item.description: A 14-year-old girl and a substitute teacher were killed in Monday's shooting. Another teacher and five students were injured.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge sentences Zephen Xaver, man who executed 5 women at Florida bank, to death
item.description: Zephen Xaver pleaded guilty to five counts of murder for killing Ana Piñon Williams, Debra Cook, Marisol Lopez, Cynthia Watson and Jessica Montague at a SunTrust Bank in Sebring, Florida in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Marino, Fox 5

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump’s Mar-a-Lago press conference
item.description: President-elect Trump gave his first formal press conference since winning election last month, during which he announced a major Softbank investment in the U.S. and fielded a bevy of questions from reporters at Mar-a-Lago.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5
